programme.title: 60 Minutes Australia 24/7
programme.desc: (NA) Tahlia Dias is one of the many young people who are victims of strokes.

programme.title: 60 Minutes Australia 24/7
programme.desc: 60 Minutes Australia provides investigative journalism and in-depth reporting on major national and international issues. It features exclusive interviews, real-life stories, and detailed coverage of current affairs and human interest topics. Through strong storytelling and on-the-ground reporting, it uncovers truths behind significant events and controversies.
